attributes.action: Raise an objection to the proposed 3p a mile tax on electric vehicles
attributes.additional_details: This is an unfair additional tax on people who where encouraged to buy electric vehicles
attributes.background: Vote against the proposal to charge electric vehicle owners 3p a mile

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: Stop the EV Pay-Per-Mile Tax https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/752431
